sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, array1 ARRAY<INTEGER>, array2 ARRAY<INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_arrays (id, array1, array2) VALUES (1, ARRAY[1, 2, 3], ARRAY[4, 5, 6]);
SELECT id, array_negative_dot_product(array1, array2) AS negative_dot_product FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_arrays SET array1 = ARRAY[7, 8, 9], array2 = ARRAY[10, 11, 12] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_negative_dot_product(array1, array2) AS negative_dot_product FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
